title: taraxacum graniticum
intro: Taraxacum graniticum, also known as the granite dandelion, is a rare plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is primarily found in the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum graniticum are said to include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in tincture or capsule form to harness its medicinal properties.
